chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 968 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA 4402/2021 3. For hearing of main case. 21.05.2025. Mr. Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Advocate for respondents Nos. 3 & 4. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Dr. Waseem Shamshad Ali Secretary Local Government & HTP Department Sindh Karachi. ***************** Reply to explanation furnished by S.S.P District South Karachi is found satisfactory and is vacated. In compliance of earlier orders Dr. Waseem Shamshad Ali Secretary Local Government & HTP Department Sindh Karachi present and files statement along with certain documents. Counsel for Respondents Nos. 3 and 4 submits that the order passed by this Court on 31.05.2023 has now been complied with. He further submits that payment for over time etc has been paid to petitioner as well as entire amount has been paid to petitioner and nothing is outstanding against the respondents to whom he is representing. He also files written statement in this respect. Since the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and order dated 31.05.2025 passed by this Court has been complied with and none has appeared on behalf of petitioner, therefore, this petition having become infructuous is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PS
